title: Lawyers vs doctors: Allahabad HC appoints ex-judge to probe claims that advocate died due to negligence
description: The Allahabad High Court recently ordered a judicial inquiry to determine whether the death of Advocate Jagrati Shukla was caused by medical negligence at Swaroop Rani Nehru Hospital in Prayagraj [Amit Kumar Singh @ Sonu Singh and another v State of UP and 9 Others].A Division Bench of Justice Salil Kumar Rai and Justice Swarupama Chaturvedi requested retired High Court judge, Justice Arun Tandon to also inquire into a scuffle that took place between the doctors and advocates who accompanied Shu
